---
title: "Talian corpus"
---

Please, complete the form below to proceed.

---

<div align = "center">

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd-HY_D_JR1nvJlDVRzdayYTyFwJ0y8qplaMWBgqMWKU9GEmQ/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="950" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>

</div>

---
